clarity.notes: Single-page product landing structure is clear: hero, pain, capability, audience, industries, CTA.

hierarchy.notes: Hero message and industry image section are the strongest focal points, with supporting sections kept concise.

typography.notes: Chinese system stack and large display scale match the reference without squeezing mobile text.

motion.notes: Interaction uses restrained hover and filter state transitions; no heavy animation was needed for this brief.

brand.notes: Palette, rounded panels, blue accent system, and Raccoon AI wordmark are aligned with the supplied reference and images.
